html:
Relics (and Broken Relics) are the remains of the Ancient Civilization found in the Ruins and in the Ancient Archive. Broken Relics can be repaired with Rocks, Cut Stone and Stone Wall to restore 5 Sanity. Smashing it (but not destroyed) and repairing it again will gain 5 Sanity again.

The Relics can be force attacked to destroy and each drop various items as follow:

Relics Drops
(80%), (10%), (5%)
(0.2%)
(10%)
(0.9%),
(0.45%).
nothing

The player can sit on Chairs if they aren't broken and they aren't occupied by other players or a Resting Horror.

Replica Relic

See also: Replica Relics as decor items

Players can craft Replica Relics in the Decorations Filter. To obtain the rare Blueprints required to prototype them, one has to insert a specific combination of items into the Ancient Chest and close it. The items must be placed into the chest in the precise order as shown, and will be consumed in the process. The valid combinations and crafting recipes for the Replica Relics are listed below:

Replica Relic Input in Ancient Chest Crafting Recipe
, , , , , ×1
, , , , , ×4

Additionally, the Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair is also obtainable by killing the Resting Horror that appears on an existing Relic Chair in the Ruins.

Also, like the original version, player can sit on the Relic Chair. The Vase, Plate, Bowl and Dish can be placed on Tables.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Relic Chair Skins

Skins for Relic Chairs can be used for replica relic and natural spawned relics.

  • The Loyal Ye Olde Water Closet skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points..
  • The Loyal Supercapa-sitter skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during Hallowed Nights 2025.
Loyal
Shadow Collection
Ye Olde Water Closet
Loo, loo, skip to my loo!

“Ancient household goods.”
–Wilson
“Old furniture.”
–Willow
“Is junk?”
–Wolfgang
“A leftover of an ancient world.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE NO NEED OF THAT.”
–WX-78
“A relic of an ancient civilization, lost to the ravages of time.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't plan on fixin' that.”
–Woodie
“Remnants of an extinct civilization.”
–Maxwell
“Where has this civilization gone? I must find them!”
–Wagstaff
“Fit för Asgard.”
–Wigfrid
“These haven't been used in a while.”
–Webber
“Where's the ancient bed?”
–Walani
“Ancient kitchenware.”
–Warly
“Me wonders if me could sell it on th'black market?”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS THING FROM YONDER TIME”
–Wilba
“Old”
–Wormwood
“Someone moved out in a hurry.”
–Wheeler
“Hand craftsmanship is old hat. Mass production is the future.”
–Winona
“It's just a bunch of unfun stuff!”
–Wortox
“Old thing.”
–Wurt
“It's even older than the furniture at my grandpa's house.”
–Walter
“People back then weren't all that different from us.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Di tích (và Di tích bị hỏng) là tàn tích của Nền văn minh cổ đại được tìm thấy trong Tàn tích và trong Kho lưu trữ cổ. Di tích bị hỏng có thể được sửa chữa bằng Đá, Đá cắt và Tường đá để khôi phục 5 Tinh Thần. Đập vỡ nó (nhưng không bị phá hủy) và sửa chữa lại sẽ nhận lại 5 Tinh Thần.

The items must be placed into the chest in the precise order as shown, and will be consumed in the process. The valid combinations and crafting recipes for the Replica Relics are listed below: {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center" !Replica Relic !Input in [[Ancient Chest]] !Crafting Recipe |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Chair}} | |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Purple Gem}}, {{Pic32|Rabbit}}, {{Pic32|Petals}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×1 |- |{{Pic32|Replica Relic Table}} |{{Pic32|Thulecite Medallion}}, {{Pic32|Cut Stone}}, {{Pic32|Nightmare Fuel}}, {{Pic32|Purple Gem}}, {{Pic32|Crow}}, {{Pic32|Rabbit}} |{{Pic32|Cut Stone}} ×4 |} Additionally, the Blueprint for the Replica Relic Chair is also obtainable by killing the [[Resting Horror]] that appears on an existing Relic Chair in the Ruins. Also, like the original version, player can sit on the Relic Chair. The Vase, Plate, Bowl and Dish can be placed on [[Table]]s. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Decoration Skins|Belongings}} ===Relic Chair Skins=== Skins for Relic Chairs can be used for replica relic and natural spawned relics. * The '''Loyal Ye Olde Water Closet''' skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.. * The '''Loyal Supercapa-sitter''' skin was awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' during Hallowed Nights 2025.
